codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses both prior image-hydration scrutiny failures without broadening scope: it gives the broad frontend smoke test an explicit 20s timeout budget, narrows list/detail image assertions to the five representative frontend-critical ids for this milestone, and removes the previously unevidenced curated native mappings so the shipped identity surface now matches the available characterization evidence.

summary: Reviewed the fix feature handoff, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, prior failed reviews, and commit `284c0d5`. The patch resolves the original blockers by scoping the frontend assertions to representative ids, adding an explicit timeout for the long-running smoke test, and narrowing curated native mappings back to the evidenced set, so no blocking issues remain.
